{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322040502012003FFEAFA24218746"}"},"total":517},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7300105047777477388","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主是神界小公主，下凡历劫，聪明果断，性格娇纵绵软又带着些强势，骄傲直接却不会蛮横无礼，清醒通透，知世故而不世故，她每每都被偏爱，绝对不虐女主。
写得很真实，每个世界女主都没有记忆，完全是沉浸式穿越，很有代入感。私设有点多，跟剧的内容差别有些大，不过解释得很清楚，不影响看。
很喜欢的两个世界：
甄嬛传夏冬春：女主背景强大，感觉女主母亲就是最大的金手指，家人的纵容和偏爱，家世带来的底气，让她养成了娇纵憨直的性格，什么都敢说，什么都敢做，而且她往往对着人的心窝子戳，有条理有逻辑，怼得人怀疑人生。她比华妃还嚣张，两人经常一起怼皇后，有点卧龙凤雏那味了，超级好看。
知否如兰：所有人都看不起大娘子，老太太不喜，对她只有面子情，丈夫只一昧偏宠小妾，只把她当成跳板工具人，儿子冷漠白眼狼，把她的母爱当成是理所当然的东西，大女儿也是处处权衡利弊，只为自己着想，小妾们也想着拿捏她……但如兰最在乎的就是她的母亲，聪颖的她会维护大娘子，把道理细细掰碎讲给她听，追求更多的权力去保护大娘子……当她成为皇后之后，大娘子风光无限，但那些渣渣们一个都别想沾她的光。","text_exts":[{"e":151,"s":148,"text":"甄嬛传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412350224218746%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227300105047777477388%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227274527664042413091%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%84%E5%AC%9B%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699690299,"group_id":"7274527664042413091","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"流年过，水飘零，风轻拂，人自寒。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/dRHPPMkbfrNK/j/64MOkw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cfd282af5093465ea6d9376429151ab7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705274&x-signature=8AH%2FBeYrd9Rtfdh%2FA%2Fg2SjpvjBQ%3D","user_id":"75100808737","user_name":"流水轻寒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"75100808737","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"
